nika check · the pre-flight audit
Audited before a single token.
signature-demo.nika.yaml rc=0 · 1 hint
$ nika check signature-demo.nika.yaml nika check · signature-demo.nika.yaml ✔ PLAN 8 wave(s) · 9 task(s) · max parallelism 2 ⚠ COST $0.0000 – $0.0000 FLOOR (unbounded tasks present) draft mock/echo UNBOUNDED — no catalog price (local/unknown model) translate mock/echo UNBOUNDED — no catalog price (local/unknown model) verify mock/echo UNBOUNDED — no catalog price (local/unknown model) report mock/echo UNBOUNDED — no catalog price (local/unknown model) ✔ SECRETS no information-flow escapes ✔ TYPES every deep output reference fits its declared shape ✔ TOOLS every nika: tool names a canonical builtin ✔ ARGS every invoke arg key is declared + every required arg is present ✔ SCHEMA every authored schema: is satisfiable ○ PERMITS no boundary declared (engine floor only) · `--infer-permits` writes one ↳ HINT [permits] no `permits:` boundary declared — run `nika check --infer-permits` to generate the tightest one (default-deny once present) ✔ audited · 9 task(s) · 8 wave(s) · permits none · est ≥$0.0000 · 1 hint
nika 0.93.1 · real cli output · mock model · offline · 100-col pty nika.sh 🦋
